title: Creating your own views

posts.author: Sarahtut14 (Sarah Tuthill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We have hundreds of people working on a single board so we set up our permissions to “Only edit content” and we lock all of our board views. We do this so people aren’t creating hundreds of views on a board.

However our users want to be able to save their own filters and views. It would be great if users were able to save their own views without messing up a view for someone else.

What are you trying to achieve

Allowing users to see the information they want to see without messing up another person’s view and without having hundreds of views on a board

posts.author: dhurst (Dan Hurst)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree. we need this. there are other posts regarding the same request.
